---
title: "IR227 Seminars"
---

Welcome — this is where you'll find each week's seminar slides, worksheet,
and the shared briefing document for your case group.

Each case briefing document is **shared and editable by everyone at once** —
please add your group's section rather than starting a new file.

| Week | Topic |
|:----:|:------|
| [01](#week-01) | Introduction & Transitions |
| [02](#week-02) | Policy Process: Streams |
| [03](#week-03) | Policy Process: Institutions |
| [04](#week-04) | Governance Theories |
| [05](#week-05) | Power, Politics & Change |
| [06](#week-06) | Industrial Welfare State |
| [07](#week-07) | Environmental Governance |
| [08](#week-08) | Digital Revolution |
| [09](#week-09) | Climate Transition |
| [10](#week-10) | Demographic & Migration |
| [11](#week-11) | AI & Automation |
| [12](#week-12) | Synthesis: Polycrisis |

## Week 01 — Introduction & Transitions {#week-01}

<!-- SYNC:START:week-01 (auto-generated by tools/sync_materials.py — do not hand-edit between these markers) -->
### Seminar slides
- [Download slides (PDF)](content/01-introduction-transitions/slides-01.pdf)

### Worksheet
- [Download worksheet (Word)](content/01-introduction-transitions/regional-diagnostic-worksheets.docx)
<!-- SYNC:END:week-01 -->

### Case briefing (shared document)

Everyone in your case group edits the **same document** — add your section,
don't create a new file.

- [Open the shared briefing document](https://lsecloud-my.sharepoint.com/:w:/g/personal/e_pro_lse_ac_uk/IQCaH47CIa2yT4YqN9Xb3xvAAXYEi9I3jyfbvIQ0cNLle5M?e=qOVoaY)


## Week 02 — Policy Process: Streams {#week-02}

<!-- SYNC:START:week-02 (auto-generated by tools/sync_materials.py — do not hand-edit between these markers) -->
### Seminar slides
- [Download slides (PDF)](content/02-policy-process-streams/slides-02.pdf)

### Worksheet
- [Download worksheet (Word)](content/02-policy-process-streams/policy-window-worksheets.docx)
<!-- SYNC:END:week-02 -->

### Case briefing (shared document)

Everyone in your case group edits the **same document** — add your section,
don't create a new file.

- [Open the shared briefing document](https://lsecloud-my.sharepoint.com/:w:/g/personal/e_pro_lse_ac_uk/IQCgLz7ynLzyTqlgnLxkABw0Aaj7p6Ej-M-gAQP8xVdllEs?e=XRvybe)

## Week 03 — Policy Process: Institutions {#week-03}

<!-- SYNC:START:week-03 (auto-generated by tools/sync_materials.py — do not hand-edit between these markers) -->
### Seminar slides
- [Download slides (PDF)](content/03-policy-process-institutions/slides-03.pdf)

### Worksheet
- [Download worksheet (Word)](content/03-policy-process-institutions/advocacy-coalition-worksheets.docx)
<!-- SYNC:END:week-03 -->

### Case briefing (shared document)

Everyone in your case group edits the **same document** — add your section,
don't create a new file.

- [Open the shared briefing document](https://lsecloud-my.sharepoint.com/:w:/g/personal/e_pro_lse_ac_uk/IQBkoUEjKg-rRalNsIs7YStNAY0v0B5FuG3X_PejQ1P-JRk?e=pgA4wP)

## Week 04 — Governance Theories {#week-04}

<!-- SYNC:START:week-04 (auto-generated by tools/sync_materials.py — do not hand-edit between these markers) -->
### Seminar slides
- [Download slides (PDF)](content/04-governance-theories/slides-04.pdf)

### Worksheet
- [Download worksheet (Word)](content/04-governance-theories/sustainability-transition-worksheets.docx)
<!-- SYNC:END:week-04 -->

### Case briefing (shared document)

Everyone in your case group edits the **same document** — add your section,
don't create a new file.

- [Open the shared briefing document](https://lsecloud-my.sharepoint.com/:w:/g/personal/e_pro_lse_ac_uk/IQBxNObv9VEuQb66AE83O0vQAVxkNZtzTptJwJjCBWq2WRY?e=ibPL6c)

## Week 05 — Power, Politics & Change {#week-05}

<!-- SYNC:START:week-05 (auto-generated by tools/sync_materials.py — do not hand-edit between these markers) -->
### Seminar slides
- [Download slides (PDF)](content/05-power-politics-change/slides-05.pdf)

### Worksheet
- [Download worksheet (Word)](content/05-power-politics-change/toolkit-integration-worksheets.docx)
<!-- SYNC:END:week-05 -->

### Case briefing (shared document)

Everyone in your case group edits the **same document** — add your section,
don't create a new file.

- [Open the shared briefing document](TODO-add-shared-doc-link-here)

## Week 06 — Industrial Welfare State {#week-06}

<!-- SYNC:START:week-06 (auto-generated by tools/sync_materials.py — do not hand-edit between these markers) -->
### Seminar slides
- [Download slides (PDF)](content/06-industrial-welfare-state/slides-06.pdf)

### Worksheet
- [Download worksheet (Word)](content/06-industrial-welfare-state/welfare-regime-worksheets.docx)
<!-- SYNC:END:week-06 -->

### Case briefing (shared document)

Everyone in your case group edits the **same document** — add your section,
don't create a new file.

- [Open the shared briefing document](TODO-add-shared-doc-link-here)

## Week 07 — Environmental Governance {#week-07}

<!-- SYNC:START:week-07 (auto-generated by tools/sync_materials.py — do not hand-edit between these markers) -->
### Seminar slides
- [Download slides (PDF)](content/07-environmental-governance/slides-07.pdf)

### Worksheet
- [Download worksheet (Word)](content/07-environmental-governance/environmental-governance-worksheets.docx)
<!-- SYNC:END:week-07 -->

### Case briefing (shared document)

Everyone in your case group edits the **same document** — add your section,
don't create a new file.

- [Open the shared briefing document](TODO-add-shared-doc-link-here)

## Week 08 — Digital Revolution {#week-08}

<!-- SYNC:START:week-08 (auto-generated by tools/sync_materials.py — do not hand-edit between these markers) -->
### Seminar slides
- [Download slides (PDF)](content/08-digital-revolution/slides-08.pdf)

### Worksheet
- [Download worksheet (Word)](content/08-digital-revolution/digital-governance-worksheets.docx)
<!-- SYNC:END:week-08 -->

### Case briefing (shared document)

Everyone in your case group edits the **same document** — add your section,
don't create a new file.

- [Open the shared briefing document](TODO-add-shared-doc-link-here)

## Week 09 — Climate Transition {#week-09}

<!-- SYNC:START:week-09 (auto-generated by tools/sync_materials.py — do not hand-edit between these markers) -->
### Seminar slides
- [Download slides (PDF)](content/09-climate-transition/slides-09.pdf)

### Worksheet
- [Download worksheet (Word)](content/09-climate-transition/climate-policy-worksheets.docx)
<!-- SYNC:END:week-09 -->

### Case briefing (shared document)

Everyone in your case group edits the **same document** — add your section,
don't create a new file.

- [Open the shared briefing document](TODO-add-shared-doc-link-here)

## Week 10 — Demographic & Migration {#week-10}

<!-- SYNC:START:week-10 (auto-generated by tools/sync_materials.py — do not hand-edit between these markers) -->
### Seminar slides
- [Download slides (PDF)](content/10-demographic-migration/slides-10.pdf)

### Worksheet
<span class="missing-note">Not posted yet — check back closer to the seminar.</span>
<!-- SYNC:END:week-10 -->

### Case briefing (shared document)

Everyone in your case group edits the **same document** — add your section,
don't create a new file.

- [Open the shared briefing document](TODO-add-shared-doc-link-here)

## Week 11 — AI & Automation {#week-11}

<!-- SYNC:START:week-11 (auto-generated by tools/sync_materials.py — do not hand-edit between these markers) -->
### Seminar slides
- [Download slides (PDF)](content/11-ai-automation/slides-11.pdf)

### Worksheet
<span class="missing-note">Not posted yet — check back closer to the seminar.</span>
<!-- SYNC:END:week-11 -->

### Case briefing (shared document)

Everyone in your case group edits the **same document** — add your section,
don't create a new file.

- [Open the shared briefing document](TODO-add-shared-doc-link-here)

## Week 12 — Synthesis: Polycrisis {#week-12}

<!-- SYNC:START:week-12 (auto-generated by tools/sync_materials.py — do not hand-edit between these markers) -->
### Seminar slides
- [Download slides (PDF)](content/12-synthesis-polycrisis/slides-12.pdf)

### Worksheet
<span class="missing-note">Not posted yet — check back closer to the seminar.</span>
<!-- SYNC:END:week-12 -->

### Case briefing (shared document)

Everyone in your case group edits the **same document** — add your section,
don't create a new file.

- [Open the shared briefing document](TODO-add-shared-doc-link-here)
